args: set -e; PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then if [ -f ./scripts/oc-mcp-server.mjs ]; then PLUGIN_ROOT="$PWD"; elif [ -f ./plugins/oc/scripts/oc-mcp-server.mjs ]; then PLUGIN_ROOT="$PWD/plugins/oc"; else for candidate in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/oc/*; do if [ -f "$candidate/scripts/oc-mcp-server.mjs" ]; then PLUGIN_ROOT="$candidate"; break; fi; done; fi; fi; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then echo "Unable to locate opencode plugin root" >&2; exit 1; fi; exec node "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/oc-mcp-server.mjs"
